title: Operating Reviews Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger operating reviews foundations judgment so operations work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Operating Reviews Foundations is a leverage point inside operations. It supports the broader goal of process design, sops, delivery systems, and execution rhythm.
coreConcepts: Operating Reviews Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good operating reviews foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Operating Reviews Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
